name: Portuaria Cabo Froward S.A.
summary: Portuaria Cabo Froward S.A. provides port services in Chile. The company operates in the Calbuco and Coronel port terminals. It offers chip shipment, coal discharge, clinker download, liquid bulk and hydrocarbons transfer, general cargo, bunkering, water supply, weighing, and logistics and distribution services. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Valpara√É¬≠so, Chile. Portuaria Cabo Froward S.A. is a subsidiary of Grupo Empresas Navieras S.A.
